description:
Create a Talon configuration for playing Minecraft hands-free in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\minecraft_mode\. The configuration must include:

1. minecraft.py: Defines a "minecraft" mode and a custom action named mc_stop_all that releases the w, a, s, d, shift, and space keys.
2. minecraft_global.talon: Implements commands "minecraft mode enable" and "minecraft mode disable" to toggle between the custom minecraft mode and the standard command mode.
3. minecraft_keys.talon: Implements game controls active only within the "minecraft" mode, including "walk forward", "walk back", "strafe left", "strafe right", "sprint", "inventory", "mine block" (left click), and a "stop" command that executes the mc_stop_all action.
